# 1.0.4 / 2017-09-11

  * perf: improve header parsing speed
  * perf: improve type parsing speed

# 1.0.3 / 2017-02-22

  * perf: improve type parsing
  * fix: handling of quoted-string parameters containing whitespace
  * fix: ensure compatibility with Node.js 0.8

# 1.0.2 / 2016-05-09

  * fix: parameter handling when type contains a plus
  * perf: use stricter regex for parsing parameters

# 1.0.1 / 2015-08-13

  * fix: ensure all errors have a status property
  * fix: properly handle parameters with empty values

# 1.0.0 / 2015-02-01

  * Initial stable release
  * Add `format` function for content-type formatting
  * Add `parse` function for content-type parsing
  * Fully implement RFC 7231 content-type format

# 0.2.0 / 2014-11-19

  * Add support for parsing parameters with quoted values
  * Fix parsing of parameters with trailing semicolons

# 0.1.1 / 2014-09-28

  * Fix handling of content-type with empty parameters

# 0.1.0 / 2014-09-14

  * Initial release
  * Basic parsing of HTTP content-type header
